notes: 4-layer SoftHebb causal-conv stack [384,384,512,512] with dilations [1,2,4,8], kernel 5, tau 1.0, trained layer-wise on 100M chars/layer, then 1408-D ridge readout on layers 2-4. Per-channel mean activation stayed at max entropy across all layers indicating SoftHebb did not differentiate channels on byte streams; readout Gram was rank-deficient (Cholesky failed, fell back to lstsq) and val acc 0.119 fell far below the 0.70 floor, so the run was disqualified. Energy 21.2 kJ over 89 s of training is well within the 8 kJ stretch target only in compute time, not in joules.
